2026-04-19T05:03:20.1521119Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1521696Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1522126Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1522491Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1522801Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1523040Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1523196Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1523377Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1523546Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1523776Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-19T05:03:20.1524266Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:20.1524529Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

I'll batch the additions together—adding customer-reported, question, and needs-triage in one call, then removing the first two in a second call—and finish with the comment.
